meta.note: Open 7 days, 7am-8pm. Use rating/count in AggregateRating JSON-LD. 'featured' reviews emphasize large/multi-item jobs to support large-cleanout positioning.

reviews.name: Tanisha Waugh
reviews.text: Fantastic experience with Dumpster Daddies Junk Removal. Easy up front quote, flexible scheduling and a warm professional disposition throughout my large home clean out. I wish I could give 10 stars!

reviews.name: Brenda
reviews.text: This company is phenomenal. I can't say enough great things about them. I decided to do spring cleaning in November. We have a two-story home with no storage and were using the large upstairs game room to store everything. They handled it all efficiently and at a reasonable price.

reviews.name: HawkLaFlair
reviews.text: I had a couch, love seat, two mattresses and an old TV that had to go. These guys got all of these things out of my one bedroom apartment on the third floor in a matter of minutes.

reviews.name: Natasha McKinney
reviews.text: Wow! I can't say enough how great these guys are! So fast and did a great job. I would use them for any haul off job I need!!

reviews.name: Ali Hasan
reviews.text: Dumpster Daddies gets it done, on time, and for fair pricing. I've used them a couple of times now and each time I've been impressed at how they loaded, cleaned behind, and hauled away my construction debris. Looking forward to my next renovation project.

reviews.name: James Aprile
reviews.text: I was in a fix with a bunch of construction debris. I called the Daddies and they picked it right up. The Daddies are the best. THANK YOU!

reviews.name: Jorae Rosenthal
reviews.text: Gage and his teammate did an amazing job quickly getting rid of all of my hectic garage items and working with me to meet the constraint of my budget. They put my anxiety at ease through the whole process. I would definitely use their service again!

reviews.name: Jeremy S
reviews.text: Just a solid man with a rock-solid business and work ethic! Dumpster Daddies makes sure your junk is hauled off at a great rate and that the job is done right. I priced 10 other companies, and Dumpster Daddies was half the price.

reviews.name: Daniel Samaripa
reviews.text: Great service. I've used 1-800-GOT-JUNK in the past and paid way more for the same amount of stuff compared to Dumpster Daddies. Dumpster Daddies is fast, reasonably priced, and professional.

reviews.name: Manuel Gamez
reviews.text: Amazing service at a great price!! Called first thing in the morning and the job was done that same day. Wow! Highly recommend Taylor and Dumpster Daddies Junk Removal!

reviews.name: Daniel Villarreal
reviews.text: I had a great experience with this Dumpster Daddies junk removal service. Gage was very nice, showed up on time, and had great pricing. Everything was done quickly and efficiently. What really stood out was that he went the extra mile and cleaned up the area.

reviews.name: Kaylee Starr
reviews.text: I called around 9 in the morning and they came same day around 1. They picked up a whole dumpster of trash and sent me proof of services. These guys are the best! Fair prices, especially for same-day service.

reviews.name: Kirstin Kerby
reviews.text: Gage helped us clear out a garage of various items. He was quick and very kind! Communication leading up to it was great. Overall exactly what we needed and a huge help! Highly recommend Dumpster Daddies!

reviews.name: Tiffany Jensen
reviews.text: I can't recommend this company enough! The gentlemen who came to pick up our bed frame and rocking chair were absolutely awesome and super friendly. A sparkling five-star rating!

reviews.name: Misti Bartolo
reviews.text: Gage was great! He was flexible with my pick-up time needing to change, showed up on time, and was quick and efficient. I love supporting a small local family business and recommend you do as well.

reviews.name: Erin Humphreys
reviews.text: Gage and his brother did a great job. They were friendly, prompt, and switched game plans with me when I suddenly needed much more taken away at the last minute. Thanks guys!

reviews.name: Carlo Fund
reviews.text: Gage and his crew came out and hauled away our leaf bags and some other items the same day I called! Very professional and nice. I'll definitely be using their services in the future!

reviews.name: Bayley Olson
reviews.text: Gage and I have built a strong relationship between our businesses in the Austin area. I highly recommend his services as he truly cares what's best for homeowners and business owners at a great price. A true professional!

reviews.name: Debra
reviews.text: Very attentive, professional service by Gage the owner. Quick to answer messages and prompt service. Able to schedule pickup within 48 hours. I highly recommend his company and will schedule again.

reviews.name: Matthew Rodriguez
reviews.text: Dumpster Daddies was great. Picked up on the first call and came out a day later. Painless experience and the best deal after going through the hoops with other junk removal services. Straightforward quote and got the job done in less than an hour.

reviews.name: Shannon Ferguson
reviews.text: Gage and his team were amazing to work with. Fantastic communication, transparent pricing. They arrived on time and made quick work of removing my nightmare. Such a relief to have found these guys!

reviews.name: Mushquzi
reviews.text: Gage is the man! Very friendly, easy to talk to, reasonable pricing. Got all of our junk out quickly and efficiently. Highly recommend this fella!

reviews.name: Sarah Robertson
reviews.text: Dumpster Daddies quickly responded to my request for a quote and were able to start work right away. Very friendly and professional. Highly recommend.

reviews.name: Jacqueline Daniel
reviews.text: Fantastic experience from start to finish. Gage was super responsive, fast, and made everything so easy. Affordable pricing and excellent customer service. We'd absolutely use them again!

reviews.name: T Iamgratefullife23
reviews.text: The customer service was quick, answering my requests the same day. They picked up the heavy items from my property, were very professional and helpful. Outstanding customer service.

reviews.name: Unaimedarrow808
reviews.text: These guys were great. Called to remove a piece of furniture and they arrived within a couple hours and charged a reasonable price. Gage was friendly and professional. I'd call them again.

reviews.name: Brandon McCloskey
reviews.text: Dumpster Daddies was super quick to come out and give me a quote. Within just one day I had the things I'd been wanting removed for so long. Quick and great service!

reviews.name: Stephen
reviews.text: Gage was responsive, gave a quick quote, and arrived on time the next day to remove an old couch. Good service.

reviews.name: Zach Davis
reviews.text: Gage was super responsive, showed up on time, knocked everything out quick and at a good price. Understood the chaos. Would highly recommend!

reviews.name: keithpayne504
reviews.text: Gage was professional and courteous. His team was punctual, got the job done quickly, and provided a fair price. Thanks guys.

reviews.name: Xzavier Johnson
reviews.text: Dumpster Daddies absolutely crushed it! From the first call to the final pickup, their team was professional, responsive, and incredibly easy to work with. Delivered right on time and placed exactly where we needed.

reviews.name: Will Mack
reviews.text: Dumpster Daddies was quick to respond, reasonable on price, and offered to pick up our junk same day. They were friendly and quick to finish the job.

reviews.name: Keelen Sexton
reviews.text: Highly recommend this local, family-owned junk removal company serving the Austin area. They gave me the best quote I could find and were professional, efficient, and easy to work with from start to finish.

reviews.name: Minda Stanfield
reviews.text: Excellent service. Highly recommend! Quick response and worked with our budget. Definitely will be calling again. Thank you Gage!

reviews.name: Kali Mac
reviews.text: Just moved and had a lot of boxes to remove. Their communication was very prompt, they were reliable, on time, and pricing was reasonable. I'll book them again for future needs.

reviews.name: S M
reviews.text: The team responded back nearly immediately and picked up all of the items the same day. The price was incredibly reasonable and the process was so efficient. Could not recommend them more.

reviews.name: Eddie Adair
reviews.text: I used Dumpster Daddies to take away a very heavy leather couch and they came within 40 minutes of my call. Gage was awesome and very efficient.

reviews.name: Gilbert Longoria
reviews.text: Can't recommend these folks enough! I was in a pinch needing stuff hauled off last minute. Gage made the process super easy, had great communication, and showed up right when he said he would. 10/10!

reviews.name: Jimmy Pacheco
reviews.text: Great service and value, very helpful all the way. Will do business again. He gets there on time and is always checking we're good. Thanks again!

reviews.name: Jessica Bramall
reviews.text: Took down a trampoline and moved a heavy dresser in less than 30 minutes. Very kind and responsive! Highly highly recommend.

reviews.name: Zachary Ferrell
reviews.text: Highly thankful and impressed with the service. My wife's grandparents needed help hauling items off and had to reschedule a couple of times, but Dumpster Daddies was incredibly understanding and kind. Respectful and helpful.

reviews.name: Laban Muchiri
reviews.text: Highly recommend Dumpster Daddies. Gage helped me on very short notice and went above and beyond to make sure I was taken care of.

reviews.name: Anthony Pena
reviews.text: They provided great, professional service and did it all the same day when I called for an estimate and availability.

reviews.name: Andrew Mack
reviews.text: Great service! I called Gage one morning and he was at my house within a couple of hours. Super communicative and prompt. We did a recent reno and he grabbed the junk quickly and for a great price.

reviews.name: James Harlan
reviews.text: They showed up and took care of business. The best pricing and quality of work anywhere around.

reviews.name: Jam Guttierreez
reviews.text: Gage was amazing! Answered right away, was very professional, and worked with my schedule. Definitely recommend Dumpster Daddies.

reviews.name: Katie Gattoni
reviews.text: These guys are amazing. They fit me in right away, responded quickly to my requests, and were pleasant, kind, and hardworking. 10/10 recommend.

reviews.name: SteveOfAustin
reviews.text: Wow! Dumpster Daddies answered my call, came to the house, and took all my junk in a matter of hours. From call to done, no joke. And at a price I couldn't beat. They even cleared the yard of trash and debris!

reviews.name: Nice Mice Painting
reviews.text: Was in a pinch and the dumpster daddy himself showed up same day. The whole thing saved me money and time. As a contractor this service was incredible.

reviews.name: Sylvia Lalau
reviews.text: Quick and efficient transaction. Promptly on time. Very courteous and honest customer service.

reviews.name: Christopher Schauer
reviews.text: The guys came out promptly and took care of our needs quickly! Thanks for helping us remove the junk at a fair price.

reviews.name: Haris
reviews.text: Great experience with Dumpster Daddies. They came in, picked everything up in a few minutes, and very affordable pricing.

reviews.name: Katie McLean
reviews.text: Very professional, efficient, and reasonable. We will definitely use them again!

reviews.name: Bruce Sumner
reviews.text: Dumpster Daddies fit me in on short notice and arrived exactly when promised. Gage was friendly and made sure he was clear on what I wanted removed before quoting a very fair price. Fast and professional.

reviews.name: Jammy Adex
reviews.text: Fast, reliable, efficient with excellent customer service. Very affordable and I'll recommend them for your junk removal.

reviews.name: Kumar S
reviews.text: Very quick and professional. When I asked for extra help on site to remove a faucet, he did it. Thank you sir.

reviews.name: Matthew Bui
reviews.text: Needed some heavy boxes moved and they showed up the morning after and knocked it out in no time. Very pleasant to work with and highly recommend.

reviews.name: Christine B
reviews.text: This company was referred to us and we can see why. Gage was incredible to work with: professional, kind, and fair with pricing. He went above and beyond, making the whole process quick.

reviews.name: Jon Raymond
reviews.text: We used Dumpster Daddies to remove junk at our house. Gage was respectful, helpful, professional, and accommodating. We'll be using them for future junk removals.

reviews.name: Doris Justice
reviews.text: I called and they came right away, I was like wow. Very professional guys, price was reasonable. Two great dads!

reviews.name: Amy Patton
reviews.text: Amazing customer service. Always communicative and super friendly. Would recommend for any of your junk removal needs.

reviews.name: Joseph Hord
reviews.text: Great service, best junk removal service in Austin!

reviews.name: Andrew Abbott
reviews.text: Outstanding work, great attitudes and work ethic, will definitely use them again if ever needed.

reviews.name: Wajiha Chawala
reviews.text: Excellent service from start to finish. Arrived on time, was courteous, and worked efficiently to remove everything as promised. Couldn't have asked for an easier process!

reviews.name: Hiro Jojola
reviews.text: Gage gave us exceptional service and the best quote rate for the job done. Highly recommended.

reviews.name: David Busch
reviews.text: I've used a few junk removal services and they're never perfect, but Gage navigated even the unexpected (a garden snake!). Transparent pricing and efficient service.

reviews.name: Taylor
reviews.text: Wouldn't use any other junk removal. Fair priced and efficient. Definitely recommending to friends.

reviews.name: Susan Fifer
reviews.text: Gage was very polite and did the job well. Reasonable price.

reviews.name: Carla Dorris
reviews.text: I'll refer Dumpster Daddies to anyone asking for a good company with great customer service. They came the day they said they would and took everything we needed gone.

reviews.name: Ron H.
reviews.text: Fast, prompt, and straightforward! Will definitely recommend to others. Thanks again, guys!

reviews.name: Rowe Whitcomb
reviews.text: Very communicative and seamless, came same day with transparent and fair pricing. 10/10 would recommend.

reviews.name: Jennifer Samaro
reviews.text: Super quick, affordable, and responsive! Will use them for future junk removals, for sure!!

reviews.name: Jonah Jones
reviews.text: Super quick service and fair pricing. 10/10 recommend.

reviews.name: Caroline Hall
reviews.text: Gage was very responsive, gave an estimate, and hauled everything away same day! Literally life changing and hassle free!

reviews.name: David Blank
reviews.text: Gage did a great job, will be a return customer for sure!

reviews.name: Sandie Williams
reviews.text: Much appreciated coming right away, very thorough and courteous. Thank you.

reviews.name: Christina Cortez
reviews.text: Gage was great! Answered my call and scheduled pickup the next day. He was prompt and friendly.

reviews.name: Kelly Mariscal
reviews.text: Quick, friendly, and efficient! Thank you so much for helping me out today!

reviews.name: Krystal Jorgenson
reviews.text: Gage was super helpful, and fairly priced.

reviews.name: Lorenzo Adams
reviews.text: Excellent job as always, will continue using their service.

reviews.name: Devan Johnson
reviews.text: Super professional and quick! Would recommend!

reviews.name: Tanner Bates
reviews.text: Awesome service! On time and very helpful!

reviews.name: Craig Thomas
reviews.text: Awesome work ethic, thanks for everything.

reviews.name: Andrew Stevenson
reviews.text: Super friendly, great at communicating, and helped me out on short notice!

reviews.name: Donald Newman
reviews.text: Really great service and very friendly and accommodating.

reviews.name: Zachariah Rowland
reviews.text: Outstanding service and execution.

reviews.name: Navendu Misra
reviews.text: Great service and prompt response.

reviews.name: Erika Kowalski
reviews.text: Went above and beyond.

reviews.name: shayy
reviews.text: Great junk removal company! Fast and easy, one guy one truck and got the job done. Pretty reasonably priced!

reviews.name: Miguel Villarreal
reviews.text: This guy showed up on time and 20 minutes later he had cleared all the trash. 100% recommend and will use again!

reviews.name: Alex Germick
reviews.text: Great job, very quick and efficient.

reviews.name: Patrick Gorman
reviews.text: We're contractors who do remodels and renovations. They offer a great service! Gage is very friendly, a hard worker, and an honest man.

reviews.name: SamBam
reviews.text: Awesome service. Gage was fast, professional, and polite. He helped me get rid of a futon and mattress from the second floor of an apartment when it would've been really difficult on my own. Quick and easy!

reviews.name: Orlando Zapata
reviews.text: The movers were fast and courteous.

reviews.name: Beck W
reviews.text: I needed to get rid of a big old treadmill. They made an appointment that same week, gave me a quote on the spot, and got to work. Obviously pros, and they took care not to damage my house or yard.

reviews.name: Terry Stallard
reviews.text: Thanks for your help yesterday guys. Great job!

reviews.name: Paul Hughes
reviews.text: I loved how professional they were and the quality of work provided.

reviews.name: Juan Loredo
reviews.text: Great and fast service. Had an old fridge to get rid of, called and they answered right away with a same-day appointment. Fast pickup, reasonably priced, great communication throughout. 100/10 service!

reviews.name: Natasha Shulz McKinney
reviews.text: Had a great experience with Dumpster Daddies! Very fast and efficient! I would use them for any hauling off that I need!

reviews.name: Ken Pearson
reviews.text: Very quick scheduling and excellent work hauling away a lot of junk. I will definitely be using them again. Great work!

reviews.name: Holli Showers
reviews.text: Fast and reliable! Great service!

reviews.name: Ira M.
reviews.text: Gage did a great job hauling away all my boxes from my move-in. There was some unforeseen rain but he was still willing to work through it. My house is free from moving and delivery boxes, all for a good price!

reviews.name: Eric S.
reviews.text: Great help, very efficient and flexible. Great attitude and communication. Very professional. Thank you!

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Had the best experience — thank you Gage! Called in the morning and he was able to remove my ever-growing junk pile that evening. Extremely professional, efficient, and punctual.

reviews.name: Corey R.
reviews.text: First time I've ever used a service like this, but the professionalism and quick service exceeded my expectations. I'd definitely recommend this company for all your junk hauling needs. The value was really good too.

reviews.name: Lynn P.
reviews.text: Gage is the best — on time and very efficient! Great company and great service with a smile!

reviews.name: David
reviews.text: Excellent work and service, and friendly.

reviews.name: Amanda G.
reviews.text: We decided to clean out our garage on a whim and quickly realized we had way more junk than our trash pickup could handle. It was Sunday, the dump was closed, and we don't have a truck — so I started calling around. Gage from Dumpster Daddies was the only one who responded, and he came right away. I texted at 11:40 a.m. and by 12:30 he was at our house, on time and ready. He gave us a fair price to clear out about half our garage — Christmas tree, coolers, inflatable bed, trash bags, old decor, the works — gone in minutes. Excellent service, fair value (especially same-day on a Sunday), and unmatched responsiveness. 10/10 would recommend!

reviews.name: Max P.
reviews.text: Gage was responsive, fairly priced, and showed up when he said he would. He made two trips and got rid of all my stuff, no fuss. Great experience!
